name: Asad Abbas
title: Full Stack Developer
tagline: Hey! I'm Asad, a builder focused on clean, scalable digital products.
about: I'm a full stack developer with a strong focus on building modern, scalable, and conversion-driven web experiences. Over the years, I've shipped products across ecommerce, ed-tech, and product design helping teams launch faster with clarity, structured systems, and intentional design.

headline: Need a web app, landing page, or dashboard?
Built fast and built right.
hero.subtext: I help founders and teams launch MVPs fast — clean, organized code any developer can maintain.
